caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and headphones sits in a studio setting for a podcast. He wears gold jewelry, including a bracelet on each wrist and a chain around his neck. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and a black desk. In the background, a wall features the word "BOSS" in large red letters and "HUSTLE" written vertically. On-screen graphics include logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and text that reads "CHECK Y". Across the sequence, the man adjusts his headphones, moving his hands from the sides of his head towards the top and then shifting his expression. A red graphic overlay containing the text "E CEO" appears on the lower left side of the screen during the later stages of the clip.
